Operation 'healthCheck' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current summary is generic and the description is completely empty. The improved description provides context about the operation's purpose (service health verification), expected output (status information), and authentication requirements, making it more useful for AI agent routing and decision-making.

message: Operation 'searchEntities' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on input expectations (search query, filters, pagination) and output structure (relevance scores, facets). Added details about query parameters, filtering capabilities, and response format including pagination and scoring to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Text-based search with faceted navigation across entities in a dataset.
data.description_suggestion: Performs text-based search across entities in a specified dataset with support for faceted navigation and filtering. Accepts search query and optional filter parameters. Returns a paginated list of matching entities with relevance scores and facet counts for refining results.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on input expectations (search query, filters, pagination) and output structure (relevance scores, facets). Added details about query parameters, filtering capabilities, and response format including pagination and scoring to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'matchEntities' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks context about request structure, response format, and use cases. Added details about MatchRequest schema usage, scoring/ranking in response, practical use cases (sanctions screening, deduplication), and algorithm configuration options to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and how to interpret results.

data.current_description: Fuzzy name matching and scoring against entities in a dataset.
data.description_suggestion: Performs fuzzy name matching to identify potential entity matches in a specified dataset. Accepts entity data (name, identifiers, attributes) in the request body and returns scored matches ranked by confidence. Useful for entity deduplication, sanctions screening, and data reconciliation. Supports configurable matching algorithms and thresholds.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks context about request structure, response format, and use cases. Added details about MatchRequest schema usage, scoring/ranking in response, practical use cases (sanctions screening, deduplication), and algorithm configuration options to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and how to interpret results.

data.current_description: Retrieve entities adjacent to the specified entity.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves entities that are directly connected or related to a specified entity through relationships (e.g., associated persons, related companies, family members). Returns a list of adjacent entities with relationship types and connection details. Useful for investigating entity networks and understanding entity associations.
